title: ArgentoCrafts
description: This mod adds a simple system to brew mate in Minecraft.
body: A mod that introduces mate, a traditional drink from Argentina. You can obtain yerba branches by breaking short grass and plant them to grow over time. Once harvested, place the branches in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to dry them. After drying, craft a Mate using 3 blocks of any wood and 2 iron nuggets. Finally, combine the Mate, a dried yerba branch, and a bottle of water to brew a drinkable mate. Enjoy this classic beverage in your Minecraft world!
